notes: Iteration 2 passes all 6 assertions — both vertical slices AND conflict avoidance.
The key fix: explicitly telling the model to keep vertical slices and use dependency chains (not horizontal splitting) resolved the tension from iteration 1.
Tradeoff: more tokens/time due to iterative conflict verification (the model caught and fixed conflicts across 5+ passes within the output).

The model discovered the fundamental architectural constraint: nearly all features touch the same 5 files, so a 12-issue sequential spine is unavoidable. Only 3 editor-only issues can run in parallel.
